case_title: BRICOLIAS ANGELO VS S. F. NEWSPAPER AGENCY C/O ADVERTISING MANAGER

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO J. PALMGUIST (NEWSPAPER) SHOWS ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $227.00 FILED BY BRICOLIAS ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT S. F. NEWSPAPER AGENCY C/O ADVERTISING MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICOLIAS ANGELO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT S. F. NEWSPAPER AGENCY C/O ADVERTISING MANAGER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
